---
title: "Teaching"
---

### Teaching Assistant, Nanyang Technological University
Principles of Economics, 2024-2026

### Teaching Assistant, University of International Business and Economies
International Finance, 2022

### Student Assistant, University of International Business and Economies
Corporate Finance, 2020<br>
Econometrics, 2019<br>
Fundamentals of C++ Programming, 2018-2019
